calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-07-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:19AM

Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles, clerk - Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Laura Rodriguez appears with counsel, Guadalupe Gamino, sbn 74011. Respondent, Erick Fredrick and Amy Elizabeth Spiering present in pro per. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles. JPT determines that the Appeal was in fact timely filed.

9:35AM
No exhibits retained. Case submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
